steps.title: Recognize that 'introduce' means identifying who someone is
steps.content: The task asks us to introduce Marie Hall to a new audience. Introducing someone means providing information about who they are—their identity. The notes identify Marie Hall as a British violinist.

steps.title: Match identity information to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly introduces Marie Hall by identifying her as a British violinist who owned a Stradivarius.

The other three fail to introduce her: A and D pivot to Stradivari instead, while C mentions her only as a name without explaining who she was.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
